business_ideas.idea: B2B conference/tradeshow as transactional marketplace: create real estate for deal-making, not content
Vertical-specific conference franchise: replicate Money 2020 model (fintech) for other industries

predictions.text: Boring B2B conference businesses will outperform flashy consumer events; real money in booth rentals not content
Bear market periods create best companies because founders have minimal competition and cash constraints build discipline
